message:
fix: drop orphaned beads_<prefix> database after bd init (gt-sv1h)

bd init --prefix creates a beads_<prefix> database on the Dolt server,
but the rig uses <rigName> as its database. Without cleanup, orphan
databases accumulate with every polecat spawn (65+ beads_pt* observed).

Added cleanup in InitBeads(), AddRig tracked-beads path, and a
safety-net after EnsureMetadata. InitBeads now takes a rigName parameter
to identify and drop the orphan.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
